## Meeting purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss content marketing strategy and goals](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tribe AI aims for $100M pipeline in 2024, targeting 3x revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Focus on creating content that showcases Tribe as practitioners/doers vs. consultants](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)
  - [Need to balance SEO-driven content with thought leadership on cutting-edge AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage Tribe's unique insights into how companies are adopting AI](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)

## Topics

### Tribe AI's Business Goals

  - [Targeting $100M pipeline and $30M revenue in 2024 (3x growth)](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Average customer spending \>$1M in first year](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Key metrics: pipeline, bookings, revenue, account expansion, NPS](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Ideal customers see AI as core to business or existential threat](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Two main segments:](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
    1.  Private equity firms and their portfolio companies
    2.  Enterprise customers (Fortune 10-2000)
  - [Decision makers: CTOs, CPOs, CEOs, heads of AI/product](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Competing against internal teams, not just other consultancies](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Balance SEO-driven content with thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)
  - [Leverage Tribe's unique insights into AI adoption trends](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)
  - [Create frameworks and stories that showcase practitioner expertise](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)
  - [Potentially anonymize/generalize customer stories for content](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)

### Current Content Process

  - [In-house writer creating case studies (high quality but slow)](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3111.0)
  - [New program for Tribe members to submit technical articles](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3145.0)
  - [Opportunity to streamline content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3187.0)

### Differentiation

  - [Position Tribe as practitioners/doers vs. consultants](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)
  - [Emphasize ability to quickly deliver working AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)
  - [Showcase deep technical expertise and cutting-edge knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule CMS walkthrough with Emmet](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3341.0)
  - [Jackie to send over ICT profile slide](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3429.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft initial content strategy and content OS](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)
  - [Tribe to provide examples of writing style/tone they prefer](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3536.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up emails with action items and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/j1XLX7znVcbyy7xzZLKJhNxy2EBr-oiA?tab=summary&timestamp=3613.0)
